source_excerpt: Median household income was $83,730 in 2024, not statistically different from the 2023 estimate of $82,690.
notes: The figures ($83,730 and $82,690) and the 'statistically unchanged' characterization all match the source. However, the claim specifies 'real' (inflation-adjusted) median household income, while the source text does not use the word 'real' — it is unclear from the excerpt whether the figure is inflation-adjusted or nominal, so the qualifier 'real' is an addition not confirmed by the provided source text.
